scripts.dev: concurrently -n cdn1,cdn2,web -c magenta,green,cyan "pnpm dev:cdn1" "pnpm dev:cdn2" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.dev:cdn1: CDN_PORT=4001 CDN_NAME=primary FAIL_PCT=${PRIMARY_FAIL_PCT:-0} tsx watch api/cdnServer.ts
scripts.dev:cdn2: CDN_PORT=4002 CDN_NAME=secondary FAIL_PCT=0 tsx watch api/cdnServer.ts
